mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone_number = #{phone_number} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( region_id, first_name, last_name, phone_number, password ) VALUES ( #{region_id}, #{first_name}, #{last_name}, #{phone_number}, #{password} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
first_name = #{first_name},
last_name = #{last_name},
email = #{email},
gender = #{gender},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET refresh_token = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET user_status = 'DELETED', refresh_token = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{newPassword}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{tempPassword}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber}
UPDATE users SET phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} AND user_status != 'DELETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET device_token = #{deviceToken}, os_type = #{osType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
